---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis Course 1"
author: "Chen"
date: "2026-07-014"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
file_path <- "C:/Users/斯图加特/Desktop/Date;Time;Global_active_power;Globa.txt"

power_all <- read.table(file_path, header = TRUE, sep = ";", 
                        na.strings = "?", 
                        stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

head(power_all)


power_all$DateTime <- strptime(paste(power_all$Date, power_all$Time), 
                               format = "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")

# 筛选 2007-02-01 和 2007-02-02
start_date <- as.POSIXct("2007-02-01 00:00:00")
end_date   <- as.POSIXct("2007-02-03 00:00:00")  # 包含2月2日全天
power_sub <- subset(power_all, DateTime >= start_date & DateTime < end_date)




plot(power_sub$DateTime, power_sub$Global_active_power,
     type = "l",
     xlab = "DateTime",
     ylab = "Global Active Power (kW)",
     main = "Global Active Power over Time")


plot(power_sub$DateTime, power_sub$Voltage,
     type = "l",
     xlab = "DateTime",
     ylab = "Voltage (volts)",
     main = "Voltage over Time")


plot(power_sub$DateTime, power_sub$Sub_metering_1,
     type = "l", col = "black",
     xlab = "DateTime", ylab = "Energy sub metering")
lines(power_sub$DateTime, power_sub$Sub_metering_2, col = "red")
lines(power_sub$DateTime, power_sub$Sub_metering_3, col = "blue")
legend("topright", 
       legend = c("Sub_metering_1", "Sub_metering_2", "Sub_metering_3"),
       col = c("black", "red", "blue"), lty = 1)


plot(power_sub$Global_active_power, power_sub$Global_reactive_power,
     xlab = "Global Active Power (kW)",
     ylab = "Global Reactive Power (kVAr)",
     main = "Reactive vs Active Power",
     pch = 20, col = "blue")


```
